prompt: Order these maritime events from earliest to latest

events.title: Columbus reaches Bahamas
events.fact: 1492 — lands in San Salvador sailing for Spain

events.title: Vasco da Gama reaches India
events.fact: 1498 — first European to reach India by sea

events.title: Magellan sets sail
events.fact: 1519 — five ships leave Spain to circumnavigate globe

events.title: Battle of Trafalgar
events.fact: 1805 — British Navy under Nelson defeats French/Spanish fleet
